assertions.title: Game page has a descriptive title tag

steps.observed: Page loaded with title 't3ingo — Playing Bingo'

steps.expected: Title contains relevant context like 't3ingo' and game reference
Meta description exists with human-readable content
steps.observed: Game page meta description: 'Play Theo Twitch Bingo! Mark squares as funny Theo moments happen during the livestream and celebrate when you complete a line.'
Landing page meta description: 'A bingo game for Theo Twitch livestreams. Get a random board of funny recurring Theo moments and play along!'

steps.action: Navigate to landing page /, eval og:title and og:description
steps.observed: og:title = 't3ingo — Theo Twitch Bingo', og:description = 'A bingo game for Theo Twitch livestreams. Get a random board of funny recurring Theo moments and play along!'
og:type = 'website' (confirmed via curl of HTML source)

assertions.title: Game page board text is SSR'd or crawlable

steps.expected: HTML source contains board structure and square text
steps.observed: Full HTML response contains all 25 board squares with text content including h1 't3ingo', h2 'Bingo Board', and all square labels (e.g., 'Says something self-deprecating about his coding speed', 'Gets nerdsniped', etc.). Board is rendered as 25 <button> elements with aria-pressed attributes inside a grid div.

assertions.title: Error boundary — invalid route shows graceful fallback

steps.expected: Graceful 404 page, no raw error stack trace
steps.observed: Displays 404 page with heading '404', paragraph 'Page not found', description 'The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Maybe you took a wrong turn on the way to bingo?', and 'Go Home' link to /
Redirects to /game?seed=r9xrYZs7Lh (valid game page with generated seed). Graceful fallback.
No console errors on either route

evidence.network: GET /nonexistent-page -> 200 (404 page served), GET /game/invalid -> redirect to /game?seed=r9xrYZs7Lh

assertions.title: Performance — game page loads within acceptable time

steps.action: Navigate to landing page /, record timestamp
steps.observed: Landing page loaded in ~26ms (navigation duration from Performance API)

steps.expected: Board fully rendered and interactive within 3 seconds
steps.observed: After 1500ms: document.readyState='complete', board element exists ([role='group'][aria-label*='Bingo board']). Total time from click to verified load: <2 seconds.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. VAL-SE-002 (game page title), VAL-SE-003 (meta description), VAL-SE-004 (OG tags), VAL-SE-006 (SSR content), VAL-XF-014 (error boundary), and VAL-XF-015 (performance). All SEO meta tags are properly set on both landing and game pages. Game page is fully SSR'd with all 25 squares in the HTML source. Invalid routes are handled gracefully with a styled 404 page or redirect. Game page loads well under the 3-second threshold.
